---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
How would you like this feature to work?

## Example Code
```aether
// Show how the feature would be used
```

## Alternatives Considered
What alternatives have you considered?

## Additional Context
- How does this compare to similar features in other languages?
- Are there any related features that should be implemented together?
- What's the impact if this feature is not implemented?

## Implementation Ideas (optional)
If you have thoughts on how to implement this, please share.

## Breaking Changes
Would this feature require breaking changes to existing code?
